title: lantana peduncularis f. macrophylla
intro: Lantana peduncularis f. macrophylla is a variant of the Lantana peduncularis plant, a shrubby species native to Mexico and Central America. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lantana peduncularis f. macrophylla include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and combat various health conditions.
